sourcesContent:
const translations = {
    en: {
        // ... existing translations
        dashboard: 'Dashboard',
        scan_crop: 'Scan Crop',
        ai_detection: 'AI Disease Detection',
        recent_activity: 'Recent Activity',
        alerts: 'ALERTS',
        status: 'STATUS',
        find_shop: 'Find Shop',
        knowledge: 'Knowledge',
        profile: 'Profile',
        history: 'History',
        results: 'Results',
        confidence: 'Confidence',
        symptoms: 'Symptoms',
        treatment: 'Treatment',
        prevention: 'Prevention',
        find_nearby_shops: 'Find Nearby Shops',
        save_result: 'Save Result',
        search_shops: 'Search shops...',
        all_shops: 'All Shops',
        pesticides: 'Pesticides',
        fertilizers: 'Fertilizers',
        seeds: 'Seeds',
        select_language: 'Select Language',
        settings: 'Settings',
        logout: 'Sign Out',

        // Auth Screen
        welcome_back: 'Welcome Back',
        create_account: 'Create Account',
        sign_in_msg: 'Sign in to manage your crops',
        join_msg: 'Join the farming revolution',
        full_name: 'Full Name',
        phone_number: 'Phone Number',
        password: 'Password',
        sign_in: 'Sign In',

        already_have_account: 'Already have an account? ',
        demo_mode: 'Continue with Demo Mode',

        // Profile Screen
        farmer: 'Farmer',
        member_since: 'Member since',
        total_scans: 'Total Scans',
        diseases_found: 'Diseases Found',
        crops_tracked: 'Crops Tracked',
        most_common_issue: 'Most Common Issue',
        detected_times: 'Detected %d time(s)',
        detection_history: 'Detection History',

        scan_now: 'Scan Now',

        // Knowledge Screen
        knowledge_base: 'Knowledge Base',
        articles_available: '%d article(s) available',
        all: 'All',
        views: 'views',
        loading_articles: 'Loading articles...',
        back: 'Back'
    },
    sn: {
        // ... existing translations
        dashboard: 'Dhibhodhi',
        scan_crop: 'Wongorora Chirimwa',
        ai_detection: 'Kuongorora Zvirwere neAI',
        recent_activity: 'Zvichangobva Kuitwa',

        save_result: 'Chengetedza',
        search_shops: 'Tsvaga zvitoro...',
        all_shops: 'Zvitoro Zvese',
        pesticides: 'Mishonga yezvipembenene',
        fertilizers: 'Fetiraiza',
        seeds: 'Mbeu',
        select_language: 'Sarudza Mutauro',
        settings: 'Zvirongwa',
        logout: 'Buda',

        // Auth Screen
        welcome_back: 'Tigashire Zve',
        create_account: 'Gadzira Akaundi',
        sign_in_msg: 'Pinda kuti utarisire zvirimwa zvako',
        join_msg: 'Joinha chimurenga chekurima',
        full_name: 'Zita Rizere',
        phone_number: 'Nhamba Yefoni',
        password: 'Pasiwedi',
        sign_in: 'Pinda',
        sign_up: 'Nyoresa',
        dont_have_account: "Hauna akaundi here? ",
        already_have_account: 'Unayo akaundi kare? ',
        demo_mode: 'Enderera neDemo',

        // Profile Screen
        farmer: 'Murimi',
        member_since: 'Nhengo kubva',
        total_scans: 'Zvawongororwa',
        diseases_found: 'Zvirwere Zvawanikwa',
        crops_tracked: 'Zvirimwa',
        most_common_issue: 'Dambudziko Rinonyanya Kuonekwa',
        detected_times: 'Yakaonekwa %d',
        detection_history: 'Nhoroondo Yekuongorora',
        no_scans_yet: 'Hapana chawongororwa',
        scan_first_crop: 'Wongorora chirimwa chako chekutanga',
        scan_now: 'Wongorora Iye Zvino',

        // Knowledge Screen
        knowledge_base: 'Zvekurima',
        articles_available: 'Zvinyorwa %d zviripo',
        all: 'Zvese',
        views: 'Vakaona',
        loading_articles: 'Kuvhura zvinyorwa...',
        back: 'Kudzokera'
    },
    nd: {
        // ... existing translations
        dashboard: 'Idhibhodi',
        scan_crop: 'Hlola Isilimo',
        ai_detection: 'Ukuhlola Imikhuhlane nge-AI',
        recent_activity: 'Osekusanda Kwenzeka',

        save_result: 'Londoloza',
        search_shops: 'Dinga izitolo...',
        all_shops: 'Izitolo Zonke',
        pesticides: 'Imithi yezinambuzane',
        fertilizers: 'Umvundiso',
        seeds: 'Inhlanyelo',
        select_language: 'Khetha ulimi',
        settings: 'Izilungiselelo',
        logout: 'Phuma',

        // Auth Screen
        welcome_back: 'Siyakwemukela Njalo',
        create_account: 'Dala I-akhawunti',
        sign_in_msg: 'Ngena ukuze uphathe izilimo zakho',
        join_msg: 'Hlanganyela kunguquko yezokulima',

        phone_number: 'Inombolo Yocingo',
        password: 'Iphasiwedi',

        sign_up: 'Bhalisa',
        dont_have_account: "Awulayo i-akhawunti? ",
        already_have_account: 'Usulayo i-akhawunti? ',
        demo_mode: 'Qhubeka nge-Demo',

        // Profile Screen
        farmer: 'Umlimi',
        member_since: 'Ilunga kusukela',
        total_scans: 'Okuhloliweyo',
        diseases_found: 'Imikhuhlane Etholakeleyo',
        crops_tracked: 'Izilimo',
        most_common_issue: 'Uhlupho Olujwayelekileyo',
        detected_times: 'Ibonakale %d',
        detection_history: 'Imbali Yokuhlola',
        no_scans_yet: 'Akukho okuhlolwayo okwamanje',
        scan_first_crop: 'Hlola isilimo sakho sokuqala',
        scan_now: 'Hlola Khathesi',

        // Knowledge Screen
        knowledge_base: 'Ulwazi Lwezokulima',
        articles_available: 'Kulama-athikhili angu-%d',
        all: 'Konke',
        views: 'ababukeleyo',
        loading_articles: 'Ivula ama-athikhili...',
        back: 'Emuva'
    }
};

export const t = (key, lang = 'en', replaceValue = null) => {
    let str = translations[lang]?.[key] || translations['en']?.[key] || key;
    if (replaceValue !== null && str.includes('%d')) {
        str = str.replace('%d', replaceValue);
    }
    return str;
};

export default translations;
